notes: v3.5.1: quality fixes from an independent product/design review. Fixed the resume headline so it no longer duplicates a seniority word or appends the weak word candidate; fixed the cover-letter tone picker so the options shown (professional, warm, confident, concise, executive) actually match what the engine produces (previously formal and bold silently did nothing); added a second skill-noise filter so junk tokens never reach the Skills line even from AI output; and relabeled the ATS score as a keyword-coverage estimate, not a real-ATS prediction, so it does not create false confidence.
